case_title: LYNLY HOGAN ET AL VS. RAPHAEL PEPI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,571.53 FILED BY HOGAN, LYNLY KIM, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT PEPI, RAPHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGAN, LYNLY KIM, JENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEPI, RAPHAEL $3,333.35 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,408.35, $1821 - WINDOW DEDUCTIONS SHOULD BE RETURNED, $218.48 - PGE REIMBURSED, $1293.87 - H2O OVERAGE REIMBURSED (1/3 OF THE $3881.62 OVERPAY) TOTAL AWARDED TO HOGAN/KIM FROM PEPI IS $3333.35 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PEPI, RAPHAEL RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HOGAN, LYNLY KIM, JENNY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, $700 - GARAGE USE, $50 - REMOVE SECOND WASHER. TOTAL AWARDED TO PEPI FROM HOGAN/KIM IS $750 PLUS COSTS. TOTAL DUE TO HOGAN/KIM FROM PEPI (COSTS INCLUDED) IS $2608.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
